case_title: LAYNE ZIMMERMAN VS. THE WINDOW AND DOOR SHOP, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZIMMERMAN, LAYNE AS TO DEFENDANT THE WINDOW AND DOOR SHOP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZIMMERMAN, LAYNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE WINDOW AND DOOR SHOP, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE WINDOW AND DOOR SHOP, INC.

DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RYAN LABORDE AND CHICO OCHOA--SALESMAN. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
